name: zeb/deckgl
description: Deck.gl 9.x runtime for geospatial and large-scale data visualisation in RWE templates. Fully offline — @deck.gl/core + @deck.gl/layers bundled inline.

full-9.x.note: Bundles @deck.gl/core + @deck.gl/layers via esbuild. Build: cd /tmp/zeb-deckgl-build && npm install && node_modules/.bin/esbuild entry.mjs --bundle --format=esm --minify --outfile=deckgl.bundle.mjs
